title: Audit dependency and autoload health
description: Read composer.json/lock and report missing locks, loose constraints, and classes loaded outside PSR-4.
body: Use when asked whether a PHP project's dependencies are sound. Actions: read composer.json and composer.lock, confirm the lock is committed for an application, inspect version constraints for overly loose or conflicting ranges, and grep for require/include of class files that should be PSR-4 autoloaded. Do not assume the lock matches the manifest without checking. Report and record each uncommitted lock, risky constraint, and manual require with its location. This skill is read-only and must not run composer update without runtime permission. Validation signals include confirming composer install reproduces vendor/ from the lock. Risk boundary: flag a missing committed lock as a reproducibility defect and manual class requires as PSR-4 violations to convert.
